title: Build Team Collaboration View
description: Create a view showing parallel Morty team work streams. Display swimlanes per team/agent with their assigned tickets flowing through. Show real-time progress indicators, blocking dependencies highlighted, and inter-team handoff visualization. Support team creation and agent assignment.
acceptance_criteria: Swimlane view with horizontal lanes per team
Tickets flow left-to-right through status stages
Active ticket highlighted with glow effect
Blocking dependencies shown as red connection lines
Handoff arrows show when ticket moves between teams
Team header shows member count and combined velocity
Right-click context menu to reassign ticket to team
Create Team modal with name, color, and member selection
agent_output: Built TeamView with team list, member status grid, team communication panel, and CreateTeamModal. Supports fullstack-team, api-team, security-team, devops-team templates.
